Secretary and Employees of the Board- (1) The nature and categories of the Secretary and employees of the Board < and the scales of pay thereof siball be ta specified in schedule-I (2) The Secretary shall be an officer of the level of Additional Secretary or Joint Secretary to the Government of India. 3. In regulation 7 of the said regulations, for sub-regulation (IX the following sub- regulation shall be substituted, namely:- * tt(l) The appointment of the post of Stwetary shall be made by the Board." In Schedule-I of the said regulations, against serial number 1, in column (4) for the entnes, the following entries shall be substituted, namely uRs 22400-525-24500 or Ra. 18400-530-22400 ." -- 3 of 5 -- ^JTHSGAZETTE OF INDIA. EXTRAORDINARY {PART III—SEC. »] 5. In Scheduie-11 of the said regulations, against serial number 1,- (a) in column (4), for the existing entries, the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Rs. 22400-525-24500 or Rs. 18^00-500-22400." (b) in column (11), for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:- "Deputation (including short term contract) failing which by absorption," (c) in column (12), for the entries, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:- "Deputation (including short term contract) failing which by absorption." I. Officers of the Central or State Government holding- (a) a post in the pay scale of Rs.22430-525-24500 or Rs. 18400-500-22400; and (b) having experience in venture financing of technology based enterprises. II. Manager/Executive- (i) Holding a university degree with Chartered Accountant/Cost Accountant/Company Secretary qualification; or Masters degree in Business Administration/Finance; or (ii) Holding analogous post in Financial Institution/Commercial Bank/Private or Public Sector Company; and (iii) Having five years experience in a responsible position in venture capital/investment financing. III. Scientist/Technologist holding- (i) analogous post in Central Government/State Government/Autonomous bodies/Industry; Cii) Post-Graduate in Science or Graduate in Rngineering or technology related subject. Additional requirements: (a) Five years experience in responsible position on technology financing/technology commercialisation.
